markdownEnumDescriptions: Field type to use to index array of numbers for vector search. To learn more, see [vector Type](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/avs-vector-type/).
Field type to use to index string, number, and boolean values for pre-filtering the data. To learn more, see [filter Type](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/avs-vector-search-filter-type/).
Field type to use to generate auto-embeddings for vector search.

typeErrorMessage.$comment: The custom error message defined above is a global override for all consuming schema.
